signed_by_ip_address.description: The IP address of the signatory who signed the form. Both IPv4 AND IPv6 are supported. You must provide the IP address with either this parameter OR you can leave out this parameter and set the IP address in the request header using the `x-gusto-client-ip` header instead.

agree.description: Whether you agree to sign electronically

alt_procedure.description: Whether an alternative procedure authorized by DHS to examine documents was used
